sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
        ALARMNO,
        TICKET_ID,
        CLUSTERNO,
        NODE_NUM,
        NODE_NM,
        ALARMLOC,
        T.TICKET_TYPE,
        TO_CHAR(ALARMTIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ALARMTIME,
        TO_CHAR(FAULT_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS FAULT_TIME,
        PORT,
        ALARMMSG,
        FAULT_TYPE,
        ALARMMSG_ORIGINAL,
        TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE,
        STATUS,
        TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE,
        TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT,
        ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA,
        ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ,
        ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA,
        ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ,
        ZERO1_ENTROPY,
        IP_ADDR,
        AI_ACCURACY
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            ACM.ALARMNO,
            TC.TICKET_ID,
            ACM.CLUSTERNO,
            NULL NODE_NUM,
            ACM.SYSNAME AS NODE_NM,
            ACM.ALARMLOC,
            TC.TICKET_TYPE,
            TC.root_cause_type AS FAULT_TYPE,
            ACM.ALARMTIME AS ALARMTIME,
            NULL FAULT_TIME,
            ACM.ALARMMSG,
            ACM.PORT,
            ACM.ALARMMSG_ORIGINAL,
            TC.STATUS,
            TC.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE,
            TC.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE,
            NULL TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT,
            AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA,
            AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ,
            AL.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA,
            AL.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ,
            TC.ZERO1_ENTROPY,
            NM.IP_ADDR AS IP_ADDR,
            SOP.AI_ACCURACY
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                ACM.ALARMNO,
                MAX(ACM.CLUSTERNO) AS CLUSTERNO,
                ACM.SYSNAME,
                ACM.ALARMTIME AS ALARMTIME,
                ACM.CLEARTIME,
                ACM.ALARMLOC,
                ACM.ALARMMSG,
                ACM.ALARMLEVEL,
                ACM.PORT,
                ACM.ALARMMSG_ORIGINAL
            FROM rca.tb_alarm_cur_mst ACM
            WHERE ALARMNO LIKE 'I%'
                AND ALARMTIME   >   now() - INTERVAL '7' DAY
            GROUP BY ACM.ALARMNO, ACM.SYSNAME, ACM.ALARMTIME, ACM.CLEARTIME, ACM.ALARMLOC, ACM.ALARMMSG, ACM.ALARMLEVEL, ACM.PORT, ACM.ALARMMSG_ORIGINAL
        ) ACM
        LEFT JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_current TC ON ACM.clusterno = TC.cluster_no
        LEFT JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current AL ON TC.TICKET_ID = AL.TICKET_ID
        LEFT OUTER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst NM ON NM.NODE_ID = AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA
        LEFT JOIN nia.tb_sop SOP ON TC.TICKET_ID = SOP.TICKET_ID
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            NULL ALARMNO,
            TC.TICKET_ID,
            CLUSTER_NO,
            nm.node_num AS NODE_NUM,
            nm.node_nm AS NODE_NM,
            pt.if_id AS ALARMLOC,
            TC.TICKET_TYPE,
            TC.root_cause_type AS FAULT_TYPE,
            TICKET_GENERATION_TIME AS ALARMTIME,
            FAULT_TIME,
            TC.root_cause_type AS ALARMMSG,
            NULL PORT,
            NULL ALARMMSG_ORIGINAL,
            TC.STATUS,
            TC.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE,
            TC.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE,
            TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT,
            ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA,
            ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ,
            ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA,
            ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ,
            TC.ZERO1_ENTROPY,
            NM.IP_ADDR AS IP_ADDR,
            SOP.AI_ACCURACY
        FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_current TC
        INNER JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current AL ON TC.TICKET_ID = AL.TICKET_ID
        INNER JOIN resource.tb_port_mst PT ON AL.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA = PT.IF_ID  
        INNER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst ND ON PT.NODE_ID = ND.NODE_ID 
        LEFT OUTER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst NM ON NM.NODE_ID = AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA
        LEFT JOIN nia.tb_sop SOP ON TC.TICKET_ID = SOP.TICKET_ID
        WHERE TC.TICKET_TYPE IN ('NFTT', 'FTT', 'ATT2', 'NTT')
            AND TC.PARENT_TICKET_ID IS NULL
            AND TC.TICKET_GENERATION_TIME   >=   now() - INTERVAL '7' DAY
        UNION ALL
        SELECT 
            SAM.ALARMNO,
            NULL TICKET_ID,
            NULL CLUSTER_NO,
            SAM.NODE_NUM,
            SAM.NODE_NM,
            SAM.ALARMLOC,
            'SYSLOG' AS TICKET_TYPE,
            NULL FAULT_TYPE,
            SAM.ALARMTIME AS ALARMTIME,
            NULL FAULT_TIME,
            SAM.ALARMMSG,
            NULL PORT,
            SAM.ETC AS ALARMMSG_ORIGINAL,
            CASE WHEN SAM.STATUS IN ('INIT', 'FIN', 'AUTO_FIN') THEN SAM.STATUS
                ELSE '-'
            END AS STATUS,
            NULL TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE,
            NULL TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE,
            NULL TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT,
            NULL ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA,
            NULL ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ,
            NULL ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA,
            NULL ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ,
            NULL ZERO1_ENTROPY,
            NM.IP_ADDR AS IP_ADDR,
            NULL AS AI_ACCURACY
        FROM rca.tb_syslog_alarm_mst SAM
        LEFT JOIN resource.tb_node_mst NM ON NM.NODE_ID = SAM.NODE_NM
        WHERE ALARMTIME   >   now() - INTERVAL '48' HOUR
    ) T
    ORDER BY ALARMTIME DESC
